place: Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront Residence Estate, Bophut, Koh Samui
note: 8 villas · book individually or together · price on request
sleeps: Up to 62 guests · 31 bedrooms across 8 villas
blurb: An exclusive beachfront estate of eight pavilion-style pool villas along Bophut Beach on Koh Samui's north-east coast, with a spectacular sunrise and ocean view and a six-minute drive to Fisherman's Village. Five beachfront villas and three multi-storey hillside villas — 31 bedrooms for up to 62 guests in all — book individually or together. Fully staffed; price on request.
detail:
Set along Bophut Beach on Koh Samui's north-east coast, this exclusive beachfront estate enjoys a spectacular sunrise and ocean view, just a six-minute drive from Fisherman's Village. It gathers eight pavilion-style pool villas — each with an air-conditioned living and dining area and a well-equipped kitchen — across a single, beautifully kept setting.

In total the estate holds 31 bedrooms and can accommodate up to 62 guests. Five beachfront villas offer direct access to the sand, while three multi-storey hillside villas sit just moments from the shore with elevated ocean views. Every property has its own unique layout — the hillside villas enjoy raised sea views, the beachfront villas ground-floor living and dining opening to the ocean.

The villas can be booked individually or together, scaling from an intimate three-bedroom stay up to the full 31-bedroom estate — ideal for big family getaways, multi-generational holidays and large groups. Each villa is fully staffed with a villa manager and housekeepers, and a private chef can be enlisted to prepare every meal with advance notice. Kayaks, yoga mats and a BBQ grill are available on request, with the golf course and local restaurants a short drive away.

The shoreline directly in front of the estate is rocky; a short 200-metre stroll along the coast brings you to a swimmable stretch of beach. Rates and configuration are tailored to each booking — price on request.

features.l: Book 3 to 31 bedrooms · up to 62 guests
Kayaks · yoga mats · BBQ on request
6 min to Fisherman's Village · golf nearby
